role_summary: the indirect tax manager ensures compliance with indirect tax laws  and optimizes tax  processes and structures.
responsibilities: • oversee gst compliance and return filings   • manage gst audits, notices, and assessments   • advise on gst implications of transactions   • ensure correct tax classification and credit utilization   • mon itor changes in indirect tax laws   • coordinate with tax authorities and consultants
qualifications: • ca with specialization in indirect taxation   • in-depth gst and indirect tax knowledge   • strong compliance and advisory skills
